page_header.label: PAYROLL
page_header.title: Private Team Payments
page_header.description: Batch payments through ZKIRA. Each employee receives a unique claim link. Salary amounts are hidden from other employees and the public.

paragraphs: On-chain payroll means every team member can see everyone else's salary. Competitors can map your burn rate. Headhunters can identify your top earners.
Upload your payroll CSV with amounts. ZKIRA generates individual claim links for each employee. Execute the batch payment in one transaction, but each employee claims privately.
Employees can't see each other's salaries. Competitors can't analyze your spending. You maintain the efficiency of batch payments with complete confidentiality.

items.title: Upload CSV with Amounts
items.description: Import your payroll data. Employee addresses and payment amounts.

items.title: Preview & Confirm
items.description: Review the batch payment. See total amount and number of recipients.

items.title: Batch Execute
items.description: Single transaction deploys escrow for all employees. Efficient and gas-optimized.

items.title: Distribute Claim Links
items.description: Each employee gets a unique claim link. They claim their salary privately.

items.title: Salary Privacy
items.description: Employee compensation amounts are hidden from other team members and competitors.

items.title: Batch Efficiency
items.description: Pay your entire team in one transaction. Lower gas costs, faster execution.

items.title: Compliance Ready
items.description: Audit trail for employers while maintaining employee privacy. Best of both worlds.
